partial_progress.details: Analyzed 4 approaches; recommended direct truth lemma over TimelineQuot

findings.root_cause: Domain mismatch: BFMCS truth lemma uses D=Int, but dense completeness needs D=TimelineQuot
findings.recommended_approach: Direct Truth Lemma over TimelineQuot (Approach A)
alternatives_evaluated: Satisfiability transfer via isomorphism (not viable - direction mismatch)
Minimal semantic argument (viable fallback, moderate risk)
